mapper.select:
SELECT com_grp_cd_seq ,com_grp_cd ,com_grp_nm ,com_grp_desc ,ref01 ,ref02 ,ref03 ,ref04 ,ref05 ,ref06 ,ref07 ,ref08 ,ref09 ,ref10 ,ref11 ,ref12 ,ref13 ,ref14 ,ref15 ,use_yn ,rgst_user_seq ,rgst_date_time::timestamp AS rgst_date_time ,upt_user_seq ,upt_date_time::timestamp AS upt_date_time FROM tb_com_grp_cd WHERE 1=1
AND ( upper(com_grp_cd) LIKE '%' || upper(#{searchText}) || '%' OR upper(com_grp_nm) LIKE '%' || upper(#{searchText}) || '%' )
ORDER BY com_grp_cd
